title: Emails & Activities Feature not showing client replies
excerpt:
Hi! 
I’m setting up the Emails § Activities feature on my item card to be able to send emails and receive replies from clientes, the feature is working great for sending and showing if the emails has been seen, however w…

posts.author: paupau (Pau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I’m setting up the Emails § Activities feature on my item card to be able to send emails and receive replies from clientes, the feature is working great for sending and showing if the emails has been seen, however when my client replies on that same thread the reply is not showing up on the widget.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @paupau!

This might be to do with the app settings. Are you able to check and ensure you have selected correct setting, relevant to how you’d like to log emails?

Screen Shot 2023-02-23 at 1.32.32 pm894×442 59.7 KB

That said, if you’ve selected the correct settings on your end, I’d recommend reaching out to support@monday.com incase this is a potential bug, as email replies should be logging into the app without an issue

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

I’m considering switching over to Email & Activites from a series of custom automations that we have set up to track client emails.

One thing that is unclear to me from Monday’s documentation is whether or not Email & Activities can/will capture emails that I receive from a contact that are not a reply to an existing email that I’ve sent them.**

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @max, good question!

To confirm, all new emails (outside of an email thread) will be logged in the app. Any replies to any email sent from the app, will be lodged within that same thread, however any of those new emails will be logged as a new activity in the app.

That said, please do ensure you have your settings configured correctly - i.e. in my case, the top option so that all emails are logged. Alternatively, if you’d only like to receive specific emails, ensure that contact is aware of the address to BCC in their initial email.

Screen Shot 2023-03-08 at 11.42.40 am1224×576 88.9 KB

Let me know if this makes sense!

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, Bianca! How do you configure which columns the email and activities app uses as the recipients for a given item? Does it automatically log emails sent to any column that has an email address? Does it need to be a connect boards column that corresponds with a Contacts board, or how does that work? Sorry, but I checked out the documentation and this wasn’t clear to me.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
No problem!

If you have an email column set up in your board by default the app will log all emails from that client (email) in that specific item. You can have more than one email column set up too. On that note, mirrored email columns are supported, so if you’re mirroring the email column from a contacts board into the current board, this will also work in logging emails from that specific address.

I hope this helps clarify

posts.author: allisonaliotta (Allison Fischer)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, I reviewed this thread and made sure that my settings were like yours but am still not seeing my clients replies show up in emails & activities thread. It only goes to my outlook inbox.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry to hear this Allison! Would you be happy to send me a private message via community with a couple of screenshots of the steps you’re taking so I can take a closer look?

posts.author: susie_anderson (Susie Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, I’m having similar issues to Allison. Thread reviewed, settings checked but I still can’t see client replies in the emails & activities thread - only in my Gmail inbox. Any help greatly appreciated!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Susie, I can definitely take a closer look!

Would you be happy to send me a direct message, ideally with a few screenshots or (even better!) a short screen-recording running me through your set up and the issue you’re experiencing? You can use the free, online tool, https://www.loom.com/

posts.author: susie_anderson (Susie Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thanks for getting back to me so quickly. I’ll take a video on Loom & get it over to you in the next couple of days.

All the best,

Susie

posts.author: susie_anderson (Susie Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Being a Monday.com newbie, I can’t figure out how to send a DM. I don’t seem to have the option when I click on my profile at the top right…

Screenshot 2024-01-29 at 16.35.57.png834×692 28.3 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Susie, just sent you a DM! It should pop up as a notification in the top right hand corner, under your avatar

posts.author: JenniferHadsell (Jennifer Hadsell)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having this same issue, can you DM me as well to discuss? thank yoU!

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

I hope you’ve been well. We’ve been struggling to get Emails and Activities to display email conversations with any consistency. I’ve tried removing and re-establishing the connection to gmail, and tried with both the BCC setting enabled or disabled, but I’m just not seeing emails show up in Monday.

Are there any known configurations that interfere with this app? Any other guidance for troubleshooting?

Best,
Max

posts.author: pjtgrizzly (Reid)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here - any luck? Basically when I respond from the contact’s email - nothing ever populates back into email & activities

posts.author: Rondo (AARON)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here. I can’t get emails I send to show at all. The emails from external contacts are showing. This feels like I am beta testing a product that isn’t ready to release. Very frustrating so far as a new user.

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s still an alpha test, beta is already an exaggeration. Almost unusable - speaking from CRM experience.

Doesn’t look like Monday bothers too much though - or for that matter, about anything helpful CRM-wise really that isn’t a fancy AI function that doesn’t even work well and that no one asked for as far as I can see in hundreds of community forum entries (e.g. summarizing emails & activities with AI hallucinates fake dates for imporatant mettings → zero reliability…)
